name: small_warehouse_basic_movement
description: Simple 3x3 warehouse with basic goTo coordinate movement
code:
warehouse : size(3, 3)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
tasks :
  patrol :
    goTo(2, 0)
    turn(down)
    goTo(2, 2)
    goTo(0, 2)

name: small_warehouse_pickup_and_drop
description: 4x4 warehouse demonstrating pickup and drop commands
code:
warehouse : size(4, 4)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  package incomingParcel at (2, 0)
tasks :
  deliver :
    goTo(incomingParcel)
    pickup(incomingParcel)
    goTo(3, 3)
    drop()

name: medium_warehouse_full_workflow
description: 8x6 warehouse with shelf load/unload and all object kinds
code:
warehouse : size(8, 6)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  package incomingBox at (3, 0)
  shelf storageRackA at (5, 0)
  charger chargingStation1 at (7, 0)
tasks :
  storePackage :
    goTo(incomingBox)
    pickup(incomingBox)
    goTo(storageRackA)
    load(storageRackA)
  recharge :
    goTo(chargingStation1)
    charge()

name: medium_warehouse_with_waypoints
description: 10x8 warehouse using waypoints as goTo targets
code:
warehouse : size(10, 8)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  shelf warehouse_shelf_A at (4, 3)
  package deliveryItem at (7, 3)
waypoints :
  dockingBay at (0, 7)
  sortingArea at (9, 0)
tasks :
  fetchAndStore :
    goTo(deliveryItem)
    pickup(deliveryItem)
    goTo(warehouse_shelf_A)
    load(warehouse_shelf_A)
  returnToDock :
    goTo(dockingBay)

name: large_warehouse_multi_task
description: 15x12 warehouse with multiple tasks, unload, scan, and turn commands
code:
warehouse : size(15, 12)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  shelf mainStorage at (5, 0)
  package crateAlpha at (10, 0)
  charger powerDock at (14, 0)
waypoints :
  checkpoint1 at (7, 6)
tasks :
  inspectShelf :
    goTo(mainStorage)
    unload(mainStorage)
    turn(down)
    goTo(checkpoint1)
    drop()
  scanAndCharge :
    goTo(crateAlpha)
    scan(crateAlpha)
    goTo(powerDock)
    charge()

name: large_warehouse_with_obstacles
description: 20x15 warehouse with obstacles and a clear path around them
code:
warehouse : size(20, 15)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing down
objects :
  package parcelBeta at (0, 5)
  shelf rackB at (0, 10)
obstacles :
  from (3, 0) to (3, 4)
  at (10, 10)
tasks :
  collectAndStore :
    goTo(parcelBeta)
    pickup(parcelBeta)
    goTo(rackB)
    load(rackB)

name: all_commands_used
description: Exercises all 8 command types in a single task sequence
code:
warehouse : size(6, 6)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  package supplyCrate at (3, 0)
  shelf depotShelf at (5, 0)
  charger wallCharger at (5, 5)
waypoints :
  origin at (0, 0)
tasks :
  fullRun :
    goTo(3, 0)
    scan(supplyCrate)
    pickup(supplyCrate)
    turn(right)
    goTo(depotShelf)
    load(depotShelf)
    goTo(wallCharger)
    charge()
    goTo(depotShelf)
    unload(depotShelf)
    drop()
    goTo(origin)

name: only_required_sections
description: Minimal program with only the three required sections
code:
warehouse : size(4, 4)
robot : start at (3, 3) facing left
tasks :
  simpleMove :
    goTo(0, 3)
    turn(up)
    goTo(0, 0)

name: comments_throughout
description: Program heavily annotated with single-line and block comments
code:
// Warehouse configuration
warehouse : size(5, 5)
/* Robot starts in the corner
   facing downward */
robot : start at (0, 0) facing down
objects :
  // A shelf for storage
  shelf inventoryShelf at (4, 4)
  package newArrival at (0, 4)
tasks :
  logistics : // main logistics task
    goTo(0, 4) // move to package
    pickup(newArrival)
    goTo(inventoryShelf) /* go to shelf */
    load(inventoryShelf)

name: named_goto_multiple_waypoints
description: Uses named goTo with multiple waypoints for navigation
code:
warehouse : size(8, 8)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  charger quickCharge at (7, 7)
waypoints :
  cornerNE at (7, 0)
  cornerSE at (7, 7)
  cornerSW at (0, 7)
tasks :
  perimeterLoop :
    goTo(cornerNE)
    turn(down)
    goTo(cornerSE)
    charge()
    goTo(cornerSW)
    goTo(0, 0)

name: missing_warehouse_section
description: Program omits the required warehouse section
code:
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  shelf rackOne at (1, 1)
tasks :
  moveTask : goTo(1, 1)

name: missing_robot_section
description: Program omits the required robot section
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
objects :
  package box1 at (2, 2)
tasks :
  moveTask : goTo(2, 2)

name: warehouse_zero_width
description: Warehouse width is 0 which is invalid
code:
warehouse : size(0, 5)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
tasks :
  moveTask : goTo(0, 1)

name: warehouse_negative_height
description: Warehouse height is negative which is invalid
code:
warehouse : size(5, -3)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
tasks :
  moveTask : goTo(1, 1)

name: robot_start_out_of_bounds
description: Robot start position exceeds warehouse dimensions
code:
warehouse : size(4, 4)
robot : start at (5, 5) facing right
tasks :
  moveTask : goTo(1, 1)
expectedErrors: robot start (5, 5) is outside warehouse bounds

name: object_out_of_bounds
description: A shelf is placed outside the warehouse grid
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  shelf farShelf at (10, 10)
tasks :
  moveTask : goTo(1, 1)
expectedErrors: Object 'farShelf' at (10, 10) is outside warehouse bounds

name: robot_on_obstacle
description: Robot start position overlaps with an obstacle cell
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (2, 2) facing right
obstacles :
  at (2, 2)
tasks :
  moveTask : goTo(1, 1)
expectedErrors: robot start (2, 2) is on an obstacle

name: object_on_obstacle
description: A package is placed on an obstacle cell
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  package blockedPkg at (3, 3)
obstacles :
  at (3, 3)
tasks :
  moveTask : goTo(1, 1)

name: two_objects_same_coordinate
description: Two objects placed at the same coordinate
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  shelf rackAlpha at (2, 2)
  package crateBravo at (2, 2)
tasks :
  moveTask : goTo(1, 1)

name: duplicate_name_object_and_waypoint
description: An object and a waypoint share the same name
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  shelf loadingDock at (3, 0)
waypoints :
  loadingDock at (4, 4)
tasks :
  moveTask : goTo(1, 1)

name: unresolved_goto_reference
description: goTo references a name that does not exist
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
tasks :
  moveTask : goTo(phantomTarget)

name: load_on_package_type_error
description: load command targets a package instead of a shelf
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  package looseBox at (2, 0)
tasks :
  storeTask : load(looseBox)
expectedErrors: load requires a shelf, but 'looseBox' is a package

name: unload_on_charger_type_error
description: unload command targets a charger instead of a shelf
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  charger wallPlug at (3, 0)
tasks :
  retrieveTask : unload(wallPlug)
expectedErrors: unload requires a shelf, but 'wallPlug' is a charger

name: goto_coordinates_out_of_bounds
description: goTo specifies coordinates outside warehouse bounds
code:
warehouse : size(4, 4)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
tasks :
  moveTask : goTo(10, 10)

name: goto_path_crosses_obstacle
description: Horizontal-first path from (0,0) to (4,0) crosses obstacle at (2,0)
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
obstacles :
  at (2, 0)
tasks :
  blockedPath : goTo(4, 0)

name: goto_path_crosses_obstacle_vertical
description: Path from (3,0) to (3,4) crosses obstacle at (3,2) during vertical segment
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (3, 0) facing down
obstacles :
  at (3, 2)
tasks :
  blockedVertical : goTo(3, 4)

name: pickup_not_at_package_location
description: Robot tries to pickup a package without being at its location
code:
warehouse : size(6, 6)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  package remoteParcel at (5, 5)
tasks :
  badPickup : pickup(remoteParcel)

name: pickup_already_carrying
description: Robot tries to pickup a second package while already carrying one
code:
warehouse : size(6, 6)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  package firstBox at (0, 0)
  package secondBox at (3, 0)
tasks :
  doublePickup :
    pickup(firstBox)
    goTo(secondBox)
    pickup(secondBox)

name: drop_when_not_carrying
description: Robot tries to drop without carrying anything
code:
warehouse : size(4, 4)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
tasks :
  emptyDrop : drop()

name: load_not_at_shelf
description: Robot tries to load a shelf it is not standing on
code:
warehouse : size(6, 6)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  package boxToLoad at (0, 0)
  shelf distantRack at (5, 5)
tasks :
  badLoad :
    pickup(boxToLoad)
    load(distantRack)

name: load_not_carrying_anything
description: Robot tries to load onto a shelf without carrying anything
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (2, 0) facing right
objects :
  shelf nearbyShelf at (2, 0)
tasks :
  emptyLoad : load(nearbyShelf)
expectedError: Robot is not carrying anything to load

name: unload_already_carrying
description: Robot tries to unload from a shelf while already carrying something
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  package heldItem at (0, 0)
  shelf targetShelf at (3, 0)
tasks :
  carryAndUnload :
    pickup(heldItem)
    goTo(targetShelf)
    unload(targetShelf)

name: scan_not_at_object
description: Robot tries to scan an object it is not standing on
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  shelf remoteShelf at (4, 4)
tasks :
  remoteScan : scan(remoteShelf)

name: charge_not_at_charger
description: Robot tries to charge but is not standing on any charger
code:
warehouse : size(5, 5)
robot : start at (0, 0) facing right
objects :
  charger farCharger at (4, 4)
tasks :
  missedCharge : charge()
expectedError: Robot is not at any charger
